encryption_spec.description: A nested object resource. Structure is [documented below](#nested_encryption_spec).

kms_key.description: The name of customer-managed encryption key that is used to secure a resource and its sub-resources. If empty, the resource is secured by the default Google encryption key. Only the key in the same location as this resource is allowed to be used for encryption. Format: projects/{project}/locations/{location}/keyRings/{keyRing}/cryptoKeys/{key}

location.description: The location in which the encryptionSpec is to be initialized.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
